title: galarhoeus pekinensis subsp. lanceolatus
intro: Galarhoeus pekinensis subsp. lanceolatus, also known as Chinese milkwort, is a plant species used in traditional Chinese medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, headache, and respiratory issues, with potential health benefits including reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In herbal preparations, Galarhoeus pekinensis subsp. lanceolatus is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
